headlines.description: — After making NBA Play-In Tournament history by winning two road games, the Miami Heat won't be afraid of facing No. 1 seed Cleveland in the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herro scores 30 points to lead Heat past Hawks 123-114 in OT in play-in and into NBA playoffs

headlines.description: — Ja Morant shrugged off a sprained right ankle to score 22 points and add nine assists and the Memphis Grizzlies beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-106 on Friday night to advance to the NBA playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grizzlies beat the Mavericks 120-106 to set up a 1st-round playoff series with the Thunder
